assertionResults.observation: Public issue #30 records PR #40 exact head 764487b955e08a5c4831ab9b7437ce75c6831a03 with canonical and mismatched pair and hook fixtures, zero-wallet-call blockers, and focused browser coverage; PR #50 run 29184758002 later revalidated the cumulative suites. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Hookless pools are identified as hookless consistently by indexer and RPC.

Public issue #30 records PR #40 exact head 764487b955e08a5c4831ab9b7437ce75c6831a03 with canonical and mismatched pair and hook fixtures, zero-wallet-call blockers, and focused browser coverage; PR #50 run 29184758002 later revalidated the cumulative suites. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: A nonzero hook is writable only when its live identity, flags, code, and declared behavior match an allowlisted entry.

Public issue #30 records PR #40 exact head 764487b955e08a5c4831ab9b7437ce75c6831a03 with canonical and mismatched pair and hook fixtures, zero-wallet-call blockers, and focused browser coverage; PR #50 run 29184758002 later revalidated the cumulative suites. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Hook identity and risk are disclosed in the workspace and immutable transaction review.

Public issue #30 records PR #40 exact head 764487b955e08a5c4831ab9b7437ce75c6831a03 with canonical and mismatched pair and hook fixtures, zero-wallet-call blockers, and focused browser coverage; PR #50 run 29184758002 later revalidated the cumulative suites. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Unknown, malformed, changed, unsupported, or indexer-mismatched hooks fail closed before simulation or wallet handoff while safe read-only facts remain visible.

environment.operatingSystem: GitHub-hosted Linux and independently recorded exact-head validation
